title: NeMo Evaluation Run Output
description: Normalized output from a completed evaluation run. Written to <output_dir>/eval_results.json

run_id.description: Unique ID for this eval run (timestamp-based)

agent_endpoint.description: The agent URL that was evaluated

summary.description: Aggregate scores across all cases. Rates are computed over SCORED cases only (inconclusive cases are excluded).

scored_cases.description: Cases that received a numeric judge score

inconclusive_cases.description: Cases excluded from rates — agent errored or judge call failed (e.g. gateway content filter). See BUGS.md #3.

good_case_pass_rate.description: Pass rate on expected_behavior=good cases only, or null if none

bad_case_pass_rate.description: Pass rate on expected_behavior=bad cases only, or null if none

benchmark.description: Name of the benchmark that scored this case (e.g. answer_correctness)

has_judge.description: Whether an LLM judge scored this case (true) or it was scored deterministically (false)

score.description: Score 0-1 (judge or deterministic), or null if inconclusive

reason.description: Human-readable explanation for the score, or an 'inconclusive — ...' reason

judge_grade.description: Raw judge grade for traceability; null when no judge ran or the judge returned no grade
